title: CustomPanelGUI
body:
---

**CustomPanelGUI**
*The ultimate tool for creating custom panels in Minecraft.*

---

**What is it?**
CustomPanelGUI is an integrated system composed of:

* 🔌 **Plugin (server-side)**: Manages panels and actions.
* 🎮 **Mod (client-side)**: Visually renders the panels.

**Requirements:**
✅ **Players**: Only need the *mod* installed on their client.
🖥️ **Servers**: Must have the official *plugin* installed ([download here](https://modrinth.com/plugin/custompanelplugin)).

---

**Key Features:**
✨ **Intuitive creation**: Design panels directly in-game.
🎨 **Highly customizable**: Full control over design and functionality.
⚡ **Dynamic actions**: Trigger commands, effects, and more with buttons.
🔧 **Live editing**: Modify panels while playing.

---

**Essential Commands:**

| Command                | Description                    |
| ---------------------- | ------------------------------ |
| `/panel-create <name>` | Creates a new panel (YML file) |
| `/panel <name>`        | Opens an existing panel        |
| `/panel-edit <name>`   | Enters panel edit mode         |

**Development Tool:**
🐞 `/debug-panel` - Diagnose communication issues between plugin and mod.

---

**Why use it?**
Perfect for server owners and content creators who want to:

* Build interactive menus without complex plugins
* Design unique interfaces for minigames or systems
* Provide personalized visual experiences

⚠️ **Note**: The plugin is required on servers for panels to work properly. Not all players are required to have the mod installed.
